description:
Overview:

1. Accurately capture the wearer's posture changes through angle and tension sensing, and vibrate promptly.
2. High elasticity adjustable shoulder strap, without fear of age and height.
3. Sitting posture correction, full of confidence anytime, anywhere.
4.People with serious back problems should seek help from a doctor or hospital.
5.The process of correction is not easy, and you need to insist on using it before you can see the effectiveness.
6.Be sure to read the user manual carefully before use.
7. Customized adjustment of the back angle, 5-50 degrees of various sitting and standing modes can be set
8. When the angle of the hunchback exceeds the set angle, the posture corrector will automatically vibrate to remind you.
9. LED counting: accumulative reminder error posture will count

Specification:

Applicable people: unisex
Scope of application: general
Style: induction vibration
Type: Orthotics
Color: black belt (English display), 02black belt (Chinese display), gray belt (English display)
Suitable age: 25-29 years old

Package Content:

1*Posture Corrector
